Think the False 9 is new? THINK AGAIN!

Before it was a trend, Francesco Totti mastered the False 9 under Spalletti at Roma. Dropping deep, pulling defenders out of shape, creating glorious chaos, then ghosting into the box to score. A tactical switch that defined an era for the Giallorossi. Pure genius, pure Roman legend. #FootballHistory #Totti #SerieA
